title: Constructors 🏗️
description: The special factories that build your objects step-by-step.

slides.title: Building Empty Houses 🏚️
slides.content:
# The Default Problem

In the last lesson, every time we built a `Player()`, they automatically started with the name 'Unknown'.

Then we had to spend 3 lines of code manually renaming them.
If you are building thousands of objects, changing their names one by one is terrible!

slides.title: The Custom Factory 🏭

quizData.question: What makes a Constructor different from a normal function?

options.text: It shares the exact name of the Class and runs automatically upon creation.

quizData.explanation: Constructors exist solely to set up an object when it is first spawned.

slides.title: Using the Constructor 📦

quizData.explanation: You pass the integer 50 directly as an argument into the constructor.

slides.title: The Dart Shortcut ⚡
